name: Crockpot Chicken and Herb Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Place the seasoned chicken in the crockpot.
3. Insert cloves into one onion.
4. Put all onions into the pot.
5. Add garlic, marjoram, thyme, bay leaf, and wine to the pot.
6. Cover and cook on low for 5 to 6 hours.
7. Remove bay leaf and cloves from the chicken.
8. Stir in sour cream.
9. Turn off the control and adjust to high heat.
10. Combine Bisquick with parsley in a separate bowl.
11. Stir milk into the mixture until well moistened.
12. Drop dumplings from a teaspoon around the edge of the pot.
13. Cover and cook on high for 30 minutes.
